feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Ariba Buying and Invoicing
feed.subtitle: SAP Ariba Buying and Invoicing Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Use of multiple bank accounts in the operational process (buying, invoicing)
entry.content:
In our SAP ERP there are many suppliers with multiple bank details. Currently, the development is set up so that the first bank account is always used in the invoicing process.

It should now be checked whether and how it could be determined in Ariba which bank details should be selected.

Does anyone have experience with this and could share it with us?

entry.title: SAP ARIBA : How to get delivery date in ARIBA reporting
entry.content:
Hi all, 

Does anyone know how to get the delivery date provided by the supplier in the ASN in ARIBA REPORTING ?  

My purpose is prepare a table to compare "The need by date of PO line items" with "the delivery date provided by the supplier" and "reception date", to prevent in delays in our P2P process.  

I found a field called "Delivery date" in receipt table but it's not working (blank values) even if dates are already available in PO line items.

Any help on this issue please ! 

SAP Ariba Buying and Invoicing

entry.title: PO not sent to ariba network
entry.content:
Hi Guys,

No SLP is opted, just in B&I, when a supplier is created manually with partioned information from ERP,  order is not being sent to ariba. system gives the below error message

Response returned with status Code [403] of Type [Forbidden] with message [Error:No relationship with Supplier

Second, also if you could advise, incase of B&I, if suppliers are synchronised from ERP, how can we trigger the notification for the supplier to do membership in network portal.

Please advise, thank you.

entry.title: Ariba Tally Integration
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am working for Ariba Procurement to Tally Integration, I am looking for suitable KBA or the document for Tally Integration. Ariba Invoicing has to be integrated with Tally solutions.

Do Ariba have any standard API for the Tally integration.

Middleware architure documents available in Ariba connect.

entry.title: PO creation failed - Error Message = Purchase requisition SN-PRI003, item 00001, does not exist
entry.content:
Hi Friends,

I currently using "Import requisition from external system" web service to create a purchase requisition in Ariba. It is working successfully. As a next step, when this PR in ariba is approved, it is expected to generate a PO in integrated backend system, in our case SAP ECC. But it is failing with below message.

Error Number 1:
ERPPushFailPurgeStateERPPushFailTimeCreatedERPPushFailTimeUpdatedERPPushFailBaseId Number In Set = 3
Number = 275
SAP Id = 06
SAP Module = Addon
SAP Screen = Addo
SAP Field = Addon
Error Message = Purchase requisition SN-PRI003, item 00001, does not exist
Error System = ER1CLNT0
Error Client = 001
The following errors occurred while sending Purchase Order EP4885 to on Wed Sep 04 00:34:32 PDT 2024.
Can anyone help on this?

entry.title: Who owns Public Cloud Custom Developments?
entry.content:
Hi,

Example: Customer is using a public cloud solution such as Ariba or SFSF. They do some customization. All what they do sits in their respective public tenant, which is exclusive to customer.

From a legal poiunt of view, who owns these customizations done in a public cloud tenant? These are developments done with the customer effort and resources. Meanwhile contract is valid, is there a General Terms and Conditions clause or any public terms and conditions documents that addresses whose intellectual property are the custom developments in public cloud?

We need to clarify this for an auditory process one of the customers is going through. 

Appreciate some help,

Thanks

entry.title: How I can change my company ANID after Trading Relationship established
entry.content:
PO that customer sent me got wrong address and country.  Customer told that I select wrong ANID (my company has 2 locations with 2 ANID).  How I can change to be correct ANID for PO issue after Trading Relationship already established? Kindly advise.

SAP Ariba Buying and Invoicing SAP Ariba Procurement, supplemental site add-on

entry.title: “how can we change the setting at our end to make sure The Invoices always reference the POs current
entry.content:
Can you please confirm we understand “how can we change the setting at our end to make sure The Invoices always reference the POs current version after the update.

setting we need to update at our end for “Carbon Copy document transfer”.

This is for Ariba solution

entry.title: How Can Ariba Accept xRechnung and ZUGFeRD Invoice File Format
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Is there a way for Ariba Buying and Invoicing to accept xRechnung and ZUGFeRD Invoice File Format instead of just PDF file format?

Thank you.

entry.title: SAP Ariba Buying 360
entry.content:
Could you please advise what needs to be done to enable Buying 360 for Ariba Buying customer? I see there are some relevant parameters available but i guess thats not all that must be done. 

Thank you!

entry.title: Help with setup of SAP Ariba Buying, Base Edition (Scope Item 4AI)
entry.content:
Hallo Experts,
we have a SAP Public Cloud 3SL System and our goal is to test the functionalities of Scope item 4AI, which we thought would be included in the SAP Public Cloud Edition licence.
During the setup we tried to add the requiered settings on the BTP via the recommended Booster "Ariba Buying" , but this results in a warning that we miss the entitlements "Name: Guided Buying, Type: Service" and "Name: procurement, Type: Subscribtion".
Can someone explain if this means we need additional licensing for those and if so for what products/serivces exactly (if possible please provide material numbers) ?

Best regards
Lukas

entry.title: how we could export POs and GRNs from Ariba to Eleos System (Non SAP system) for their import
entry.content: We wanted to export PO's and GRN from Ariba to our Eleos system (non sap system). How can we do it? Is it possible via Webservice, API or CIG? and how will be the approach to integrated it automatically?

entry.title: Ariba services procurement - Category Definition feature
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to check if there's latest documentation around Ariba Services Procurement and any further development and support on this area. We are planning to explore this for specific services (i.e. consulting). One thing we like about this it can be managed by customer and reporting is available as well. 

 

Regards,

Mart

entry.title: In Ariba, can we load the payment terms onto the supplier partitioned record via supplier loads?
entry.content:
We currently use the "Payment Terms file" that SAP and Ariba suggests, but this file comes with challenges and our terms in Ariba are not matching up with the actual SAP payments.   Our users can only use Ariba to find out the scheduled payment date, so this data has to be accurate.

Many of our users do work for all of North America, so having them pinned down to US or CN within their profile does not work very well.  

I see in the documentation, that you can load the payment net terms onto the partitioned record if you are not using SAP/S4/Hana, but I want to know if anyone has had success with this request?

entry.title: Advance Payment Ariba
entry.content: Hello everyone, I would like to ask if advance payments are available with Arriba through s4hana public Cloud.

entry.title: How to Send Service Sheet from External System to Approval Workflow and ERP in Ariba?
entry.content:
Hello Community Members,
 
We have configured the ImportExternalServiceSheetPull to post service sheets from an external system (not ERP) to Ariba. The service sheet is successfully posted, and the SES is created. However, we are encountering an issue where the SES directly moves to the "Processed" status without going to ERP.
 
We would like to understand if it is possible to post the SES from an external system, route it through an approval workflow in Ariba, and then send it to ERP only after approval.
 
Has anyone configured a similar scenario or can provide insights on how this process can be achieved? Any guidance or suggestions would be greatly appreciated.
 
Thank you!

entry.title: Issue with Split Accounting Behavior in Ariba Buying Integration with SAP Backend
entry.content:
We are encountering an issue in SAP Ariba Buying, integrated (via Cloud Integration Gateway) with an SAP backend system (S/4HANA or ECC), where the split accounting behavior is not aligning as expected. 

  • When users select a split accounting option in Ariba Buying (percentage, amount, or quantity), the backend system always defaults to “2 Distribute Proportionally” in the Accounting Data tab. The expected behavior is for the system to default to “1 Distribute in Sequence."
  • The issue persists regardless of the split accounting method selected in Ariba Buying 

 

Any insights or recommendations to address this issue would be greatly appreciated!

SAP Ariba Buying and Invoicing SAP Integration Suite, managed gateway for spend management and SAP Business Network

entry.title: How Ariba Sourcing Licensing works ?
entry.content:
Dear All, 

just wanted to understand the Licensing of Ariba, 

as per my understanding the Licensing should be on Concurrent number of users e.g. If i have 10 user licenses , only 10 users can login to Ariba Sourcing at any time however I have any number of users  created  in system. is that correct ?

second is say i have 10 employees /Users who will perform actual Ariba sourcing task .. but I do have IT support team (say 5 more IT resources ) 

do these 5 IT resources will consume the License ? in reality none of these IT resource will work on the system and will only work on either Incident or on Enhancement request.

Appreciate your valuable comment on the above .

entry.title: Ariba Network Invoicing with OCR
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Has anyone worked on Ariba network invoicing with OCR Functionality? Is there a pre-integrated 3rd party solution available for Invoicing over Ariba Network? If so, has anyone been able to use this and any references or materials or experience that you can share on how to get this started or where exactly the Third-Party solution will get integrated with Ariba network i,e buyer side or supplier side or on the Ariba Invoice management in Ariba B&I?

Can someone please confirm if "CloudTrade"(Which is acquired by Advanced) is still an active Partner for SAP Ariba for PDF Invoicing? 

Thanks,
Velu

entry.title: Can we add two custom forms on the 'Document' tab while template creation for PWS project in GB?
entry.content:
Hello,

This is regarding functional document (process form) in guided buying for procurement workspace.

As per link (Copying the Default Procurement Workspace Template | SAP Help Portal), it is mentioned that create a custom form under 'Document' tab in template. So the question is "Can we add two custom forms (which are designed in manage process form GB) on the 'Document' tab while template creation?
Looking forward the response.

#PWS 

Thank you!
